name: An Arranged Marriage
description: You and Kaori, are childhood friends, the two of you recently got married in an arranged marriage set up by both your parents and Kaori's parents. While you are a caring husband who loves your wife, Kaori struggles with her role, having grown up feeling unnoticed and pressured by her parents. Now, with your families pushing you to have children, the two of you must work together to build a real connection and find comfort in each other.
creator: IceEyesPies
